chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. CP No.D-4552 of 2015 CP No.D-5666 of 2015 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.19765/2015. 2. For hearing of main case. 01.10.2025. Mr. Muhammad Arif, Advocates for the Petitioner. Mr. Ameeruddin, Advocate for the Respondent No.5. Mr. Mehran Khan, AAG. --------------- Learned counsel for the Petitioner in CP No.D-4552 of 2015 states under instructions that the Petition is not being pressed further. In view of such statement, that Petition stands dismissed accordingly. No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner in the other connected Petition to pursue the same, which accordingly stands dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS
